name: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection')
description: The product constructs all or part of a command using externally-influenced input without properly neutralizing special elements that could modify the intended command when it is sent to a downstream component for execution.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that is incorporated into a command string flowing to an EXTERNAL[command_execution] node (system, exec, popen, Runtime.exec, subprocess) without a TRANSFORM[command_neutralization] node that parameterizes the command or escapes command-significant special elements
